summary: Completed the bounded SpecBridge v3 governed product build for issue #261 as a separate private repository at https://github.com/yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge-v3. Claude Code ran first and produced the v3 bootstrap repository with local tests passing. Codex reviewed and hardened the result by converting the useful Ponytail-inspired discipline into structured local minimalism-review validation, adding negative tests, aligning docs/readiness evidence, committing, creating the private GitHub repository, pushing normally to master, and verifying GitHub Actions CI. The v3 commit 83ddcfa0358cb302ea11aadf0bdb0fc38f241f71 was pushed to origin/master and CI run 28203941848 passed.
validations: SpecBridge v1 powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/validate-contracts.ps1: passed after #261 contract creation
SpecBridge v1 powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/validate-contract-scopes.ps1: passed after #261 scope creation
SpecBridge v3 Claude Code first invocation completed and reported 177 passed, 0 failed
SpecBridge v3 Claude Code hardening invocation timed out after 20 minutes; Codex inspected partial changes and completed the hardening
SpecBridge v3 powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\test.ps1: passed with 177 bootstrap assertions and 24 minimalism-review assertions
SpecBridge v3 direct bootstrap validator with .specbridge\reviews\bootstrap.minimalism-review.json: passed
SpecBridge v3 git diff --check before commit: passed with line-ending warnings only
SpecBridge v3 git commit: 83ddcfa0358cb302ea11aadf0bdb0fc38f241f71 Harden v3 minimalism review gate
SpecBridge v3 gh repo create yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge-v3 --private --source . --remote origin --push: passed
SpecBridge v3 gh repo view yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge-v3: passed, visibility PRIVATE, default branch master
SpecBridge v3 gh run view 28203941848: CI completed successfully on 83ddcfa0358cb302ea11aadf0bdb0fc38f241f71
policy_result: Within the dedicated issue #261 contract. The work did not access secrets, install dependencies, change production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, databases, deployment automation, hosted runtimes, external AI providers, mutation-capable MCP tools, repository visibility to public, CI workflow security outside the new v3 read-only workflow, force push, branch deletion, or remote deletion. The only remote mutation was the authorized private repository creation and normal non-force push to specbridge-v3 origin/master after local tests passed.
risk_result: High-risk repository creation was bounded to yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge-v3. Codex reviewed the Claude-generated v3 result, found the minimalism gate too permissive when it accepted five string fields, and hardened it into structured evidence validation with additional negative tests for array shape, missing reasons, dependency declarations, non-pass verdict, scope mismatch, and parent traversal. The v3 MVP remains local-first, dependency-free, and static-validator only. The new minimalism gate is repository-native validation, not a Ponytail dependency, plugin, or MCP install.
unresolved_risks: The v1 evidence branch is not merged into main.
Runtime operation enforcement remains future scope; v3 validates manifests and reviews but does not execute or sandbox operations.
External Claude/provider orchestration remains future scope; v3 is a local validator MVP.
CI still uses actions/checkout@v4 rather than a SHA-pinned action because broader CI workflow hardening is outside this contract.
merge_status: v3 master was updated by normal non-force push. No autonomous merge into SpecBridge v1 main was performed; v1 evidence remains on branch codex/issue-255-serious-product-build-pilot and requires PR, CI, review, and explicit operator merge authority.
deployment_status: Not applicable. No deployment was requested or performed. Rollback v3 by reverting commit 83ddcfa0358cb302ea11aadf0bdb0fc38f241f71 in the specbridge-v3 repository or by recreating from the initial bootstrap commit d72cce8 if the hardening must be removed. No production state or deployed runtime was changed.
